name: TARGETPAIRS_BY_TARGET
description: Target pairs by target. Auto-generated from the core-four benchmark and aligned to the validated query-frame Cypher semantics.
cypher:
MATCH (t:Target {symbol: $target})<-[:HAS_TARGET]-(tp:TargetPair)
RETURN DISTINCT tp.name AS target_pair
ORDER BY target_pair
LIMIT 50

examples: What are the specific target-pair combinations that include PDGFB?
What are the specific target-pair combinations that include WT1?
What are the specific target-pair combinations that include NECTIN4?
